privacy: 🔒 Your data is stored locally only. Nothing is sent to a server.

home.hero_sub: Fake news spreads faster than you think — verify with AI and trusted sources
home.text_placeholder: Paste the news text or content you want to verify...
home.url_hint: Enter the URL of the news. The system will analyze both the content and the website credibility.
home.upload_text: Click or drag an image file here
home.upload_hint: Supports JPG, PNG, WEBP — max 10 MB

result.ai_warning: ⚠ AI is not confident in this result. Please verify further.

history.title: Verification History
history.subtitle: Stored locally only • Max 100 entries
history.confirm_body: This will permanently delete all verification history from your device. This cannot be undone.
history.empty_sub: Start by verifying your first news item

trending.title: Most Checked News
trending.subtitle: Updated every 15 minutes — anonymized aggregate data
trending.privacy_notice: Data is aggregated statistics only. No personal data is collected.

errors.UNSUPPORTED_TYPE: Unsupported file type. Only JPG, PNG, WEBP allowed
errors.RATE_LIMITED: Too many requests. Please wait a moment
